Localization.Name: UltiFlex
Localization.Description: Been around for a couple hundred years. Survival company that makes knives. Got their start by making combat knives for the UEE Army. Expanded their operations to the public after decades of proud service.

English.Name: UltiFlex
English.Description: Been around for a couple hundred years. Survival company that makes knives. Got their start by making combat knives for the UEE Army. Expanded their operations to the public after decades of proud service.

Localization.Name: Novian "Nighthunter" Crossbow
Localization.Description:
Manufacturer: UltiFlex
Item Type: Crossbow
  
Magazine Size: 5
Rate Of Fire: 60 rpm
Effective Range: 50 m
  
Attachments: Optics (S3), Underbarrel (S3)
  
The craftsman at UltiFlex went through hundreds of prototypes to discover the perfect lightweight material with the right combination of strength and flexibility for its Novian crossbow, an ideal companion on everything from frontier expeditions to tactical infiltrations. With a pull of its firing action, the Novian near-silently launches a heavy bolt that shatters on impact causing devastating damage to close-range targets. 
 
The Nighthunter edition sports a dipped-in-shadow matte black frame.

Capacity: 5

This magazine for the Novian crossbow comes preloaded with five bolts.
